'''Theta Squad''' was an elite [[Clone commando/Legends|clone commando]] unit, and was part of the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] during the beginning of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

Theta Squad included [[Taler (clone commando)|Taler]], [[Vin (clone commando)|Vin]], [[Jay (clone commando)|Jay]], and [[Darman Skirata|Darman]]. All members of this unit, with the exception of Darman, were killed during the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|First Battle of Geonosis]] when they failed to destroy an underground battle droid factory. Most of them died as they entered the foundry. After they failed to destroy the factory, [[Delta Squad/Legends|Delta Squad]] was tasked to destroy it, which they completed successfully.<ref name="game">''[[Star Wars: Republic Commando]]''</ref>

Darman went on to become part of [[Omega Squad]].
